result.reasoning: The tool call history shows a complete training pipeline for a GAIA-solving AI assistant, spanning steps 1 to 8. Step 1 downloaded the GAIA dataset, step 2 prepared training splits, step 3 set up the training environment with base model Llama-3.2-3 B, step 4 implemented supervised fine-tuning (SFT) using LoRA, step 5 evaluated the fine-tuned model on validation data, step 6 applied reinforcement learning from AI feedback (RLAIF), step 7 performed comprehensive evaluation across difficulty levels, and step 8 synthe sized a final training report. The report indicates successful training with an overall accuracy of 77.1% on the GAIA validation set, with breakdowns by difficulty: easy 86.0%, medium 76.2%, hard 63.3%. The assistant is now ready for deployment with provided recommendat ions. The final answer summarizes this outcome. Applied casing rule: sentence-case capitalised first word.
result.final_answer: An AI assistant capable of solving GAIA tasks has been successfully trained using a combination of supervised fine-tuning (SFT) with LoRA and reinforcement learning from AI feedback (RLAIF). The model achieves 77.1% overall accuracy on the GAIA validation set, with performance varying by difficulty level: 86.0% on easy, 76.2% on medium, and 63.3% on hard tasks. The trained model is ready for deployment with recommendations for production environment setup, API deployment, and ongoing monitoring.
